/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -std=c++11 -pthread -g -g --coverage -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/client.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../../bin/client  -lgcov libclient_static.a /usr/lib/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-network.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-window.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-system.so.2.6.2 ../shared/libshared_static.a -lgcov
